reviews.hysteriox: Excellent Discord developer, I highly recommend him!
reviews.ravens: Very good developer, he was able to meet my expectations within a reasonable timeframe, and frankly, superb work for a first time with this language.
reviews.vipexx: Fast, efficient, attentive, nothing to complain about regarding the work provided by Panda!
reviews.apotros: Panda Guerrier demonstrated professionalism throughout my order; excellent quality bot, I recommend.
reviews.pohypes: Jules is always attentive and very committed to his work. He masters many tools and helped us to have a simple and efficient Discord server, I recommend him!

hero.title: Jules Lofficial
hero.description: Full-Stack Developer passionate about creating exceptional web experiences.

about.age: , I am a {age}-year-old French developer. I am passionate about programming and I am always looking for new challenges.
about.started: It all started when I was 12: I discovered the world of programming and immediately fell in love with it. I started with JavaScript by creating Discord bots, then I discovered development with Java, Dart, etc. I love creating new things. I was working on a Minecraft server called Conodia but it closed, and I also participate in a framework project for Discord bots called
about.school: I am currently in higher education at Efrei, in France, and my goal is to become a software engineer. I am also a freelancer and I am always looking for new projects to work on.
